ILLUSIONIST_CHARACTER_ILLUSIONIST.title: Illusionist
ILLUSIONIST_CHARACTER_ILLUSIONIST.descri: A trickster of mirrors and illusions. Copy summons mirror images that replay your first card each turn and shatter when you take unblocked damage; read and reflect enemy intent; and transmute your own cards on the fly.
ILLUSIONIST_CHARACTER_ILLUSIONIST.cardsM: Adds the Illusionist's cards to the pool.
ILLUSIONIST_CHARACTER_ILLUSIONIST.eventD: The Illusionist slips behind a mirror and refuses to fade.
ILLUSIONIST_CHARACTER_ILLUSIONIST.goldMo: Why settle for one reflection of fortune? I'll take every glittering image at once.
ILLUSIONIST_CHARACTER_ILLUSIONIST.aromaP: Chaos is only another illusion — and illusions answer to me.
